instructions.name: add_value_source
docs: Admin-only. Registers a `ValueSource` slot for a strategy. `kind`
0 = SplAtaBalance (read u64 at offset 64..72 of `target_account`);
1 = AccountU64 (read u64 at `offset..offset+8`). The raw read is
scaled by `scale_num/scale_den` to convert into underlying-token
units (e.g. cToken → underlying via the protocol's exchange rate).

instructions.name: add_vault_allowed_token
docs: Per-vault, curator-controlled mint allow-list (Option B —
defense-in-depth). The protocol-level `AllowedToken` PDA must
already exist for the mint; this only narrows the protocol set
down to a vault-specific subset. Admin-signed.

accounts.name: allowed_token
docs: The protocol-level allow-list entry must already exist for the
mint. This enforces the "per-vault list ⊆ global list"
invariant: an admin can only narrow the protocol-approved set,
never extend it.

instructions.name: clear_auto_action_config
docs: Admin-only. Closes the AutoActionConfig PDA, returning rent to the
admin. Call before re-issuing `set_auto_action_config` for the
same `(strategy, kind)` to update the recorded intent.

accounts.name: caller_token_ata
docs: Caller's wallet ATA — anti-theft snapshot point.

accounts.name: delegate_token_ata
docs: Delegate's wallet ATA — also snapshotted (audit #30 revised). When the
authority is the caller this catches "authority routes funds to the
agent" attacks; when caller == delegate, both ATAs point to the same
account and the second check is redundant but safe.

accounts.name: allowed_output_token
docs: be the `["allowed_token", remaining_accounts[index].key()]` PDA
owned by this program (the protocol-level allow-list — governance
controlled). When `None`, the account is unused. Caller passes
any account (e.g. SystemProgram::id) as a placeholder.

accounts.name: vault_allowed_output_token
docs: be the `["vault_allowed_token", vault_state, mint]` PDA owned by
this program (the per-vault curator allow-list). Defense-in-depth
alongside `allowed_output_token`: governance vetoes broken mints
globally, the vault admin further narrows the swap-output universe
per vault. When `None`, the account is unused.

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: introspection to ensure no other instruction in the same
transaction touches the strategy ATA.

instructions.name: rebalance_strategy
docs: Rebalance is now authority-only (audit #5). The two transfer legs sign
as different PDAs: in-leg (reserve → strategy) signs as
`vault_authority`; out-leg signs as `strategy_authority[i]`.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Audit #5: rebalance is now authority-only.

instructions.name: rebalance_with_delta
docs: Phase-5: explicit signed-delta rebalance. Authority-only. Pushes
`delta` if positive (reserve → strategy) and pulls if negative
(strategy → reserve). Reverts on overflow / under-flow / when the
reserve can't cover a positive delta.

instructions.name: remove_value_source
docs: Admin-only. Closes a `ValueSource` PDA, returning rent.

instructions.name: remove_vault_allowed_token
docs: Closes a per-vault `VaultAllowedToken` PDA, refunding rent to
the admin. Admin-signed.

instructions.name: report_loss
docs: Authority reports a realized loss on a strategy. Decrements both
`strategy.allocated_amount` and `vault_state.total_deposited` by the
loss. Reverts if the loss exceeds either tracked total. Audit #6.

accounts.name: strategy_token_account
docs: Audit #14: pin the ATA's mint to the vault's underlying mint.

instructions.name: set_auto_action_config
docs: Admin-only. Records the curator's intended `(target, disc, ix_data)`
for what this strategy should do when funds enter (kind=0) or
leave (kind=1). Read off-chain by the agent; on-chain auto-CPI
invocation is a future phase.

instructions.name: settle_strategy_value
docs: Authority-only. Computes a strategy's live total (idle ATA balance
plus the sum of registered ValueSources, scaled into underlying
units) and settles `strategy.allocated_amount` + `vault.total_deposited`
to match. Pause-gated. Caller passes
`[value_source_pda, target_account]` pairs in `remaining_accounts`.

accounts.name: admin_token_account
docs: Audit #11: program creates this on-demand if it doesn't exist so a
withdrawer never gets blocked by a missing admin ATA.

accounts.name: admin_wallet
docs: account. Pubkey validated by constraint.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury's underlying-token ATA — receives the protocol cut.

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance in source account

errors.name: InsufficientReserve
errors.msg: Insufficient reserve for withdrawal

errors.name: StrategyInactive
errors.msg: Strategy is not active

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Unauthorized: not admin

errors.name: UnauthorizedAuthority
errors.msg: Unauthorized: not authority

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid token mint

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: WeightExceedsMax
errors.msg: Weight exceeds maximum of 10000 basis points

errors.name: InsufficientReserveForRebalance
errors.msg: Insufficient reserve for rebalance allocation

errors.name: VaultPaused
errors.msg: Vault is paused

errors.name: StrategyStillHoldsFunds
errors.msg: Strategy still holds funds — deallocate to zero before deactivating

errors.name: CallerNotDelegateOrAuthority
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is neither delegate nor authority

errors.name: TargetProgramMismatch
errors.msg: Target program account does not match requested target

errors.name: ActionNotAllowed
errors.msg: Action not allowed for this strategy

errors.name: RecipientIndexOutOfRange
errors.msg: Expected recipient index is out of range

errors.name: RecipientMismatch
errors.msg: Recipient at expected index is not the strategy token account

errors.name: AntiTheft
errors.msg: Anti-theft: caller or delegate ATA balance grew during execute_action

errors.name: FeeExceedsMax
errors.msg: Fee bps exceeds protocol cap

errors.name: LossExceedsDeposited
errors.msg: Reported loss exceeds tracked deposit total

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Caller is not the pending admin

errors.name: NotPendingAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the pending authority

errors.name: WeightSumExceedsMax
errors.msg: Sum of active strategy weights would exceed 10000 bps

errors.name: MintHasTransferHook
errors.msg: Token mint carries a TransferHook extension; not supported

errors.name: MintHasPermanentDelegate
errors.msg: Token mint carries a PermanentDelegate extension; not supported

errors.name: DuplicateDelegate
errors.msg: Delegate is already used by another active strategy in this vault

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow

errors.name: UnauthorizedGovernance
errors.msg: Caller is not the protocol governance

errors.name: TreasuryMismatch
errors.msg: Treasury account mismatch with protocol_config.treasury

errors.name: PerformanceFeeBelowProtocolFee
errors.msg: performance_fee_bps cannot be set below the protocol cut

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Reserve plus available strategy ATAs cannot cover the requested withdrawal

errors.name: OutputMintNotAllowed
errors.msg: Output mint is not on the protocol allow-list

errors.name: VaultOutputMintNotAllowed
errors.msg: Output mint is not on this vault's curator allow-list

errors.name: OutputMintIndexOutOfRange
errors.msg: Output mint index is out of range of remaining_accounts

errors.name: ActionCooldownActive
errors.msg: Allowed-action cooldown has not elapsed

errors.name: ActionLossExceedsCap
errors.msg: Loss booked by execute_action exceeds the per-action cap

errors.name: LossCapTooHigh
errors.msg: Per-action loss cap exceeds protocol maximum

errors.name: SiblingInstructionForbidden
errors.msg: Sibling instruction in this transaction is forbidden by introspection guard

errors.name: DeltaOutOfRange
errors.msg: Signed delta would push allocated_amount negative or overflow

errors.name: InvalidAutoActionKind
errors.msg: AutoActionConfig kind must be 0 (Deposit) or 1 (Withdraw)

errors.name: AutoActionDataTooLarge
errors.msg: AutoActionConfig ix_data exceeds the 256-byte cap

errors.name: InvalidValueSourceKind
errors.msg: ValueSource kind must be 0 (SplAtaBalance) or 1 (AccountU64)

errors.name: ValueSourceIndexOutOfBounds
errors.msg: ValueSource index exceeds MAX_VALUE_SOURCES_PER_STRATEGY

errors.name: InvalidValueSourceScale
errors.msg: ValueSource scale_den must be non-zero

errors.name: ValueSourceTargetMismatch
errors.msg: ValueSource target account passed in remaining_accounts does not match the registered target

errors.name: ValueSourceTargetTooSmall
errors.msg: ValueSource target account data is shorter than required offset+8

errors.name: AccountMismatch
errors.msg: Account passed in remaining_accounts does not match the expected key/owner/layout

errors.name: ValueSourceTargetIsStrategyAta
errors.msg: ValueSource target_account must not equal the strategy's own ATA (would double-count)

errors.name: FanOutExceedsDeposit
errors.msg: Cumulative fan-out from a single deposit cannot exceed the deposit amount

fields.name: expected_recipient_index
docs: Audit #8: index in remaining_accounts that must equal
`strategy.token_account`. No longer optional.

fields.name: output_mint_index
docs: Phase-4d: when `Some`, the mint at
`remaining_accounts[output_mint_index]` must be on the protocol
allow-list (an `AllowedToken` PDA must exist). Used to gate
swap-style actions (Jupiter route, Drift open-position) so a
compromised agent can't pivot the strategy into a worthless asset.

fields.name: loss_per_call_bps_cap
docs: Phase-5: max loss this single call may book against the strategy
ATA, in basis points of `strategy.allocated_amount` at call time.
`0` disables the check. Capped at `MAX_LOSS_PER_CALL_BPS`.

fields.name: cooldown_secs
docs: Phase-5: minimum seconds between successful invocations of this
allowed action. `0` disables. Combined with `last_executed_at` to
rate-limit a compromised agent.

fields.name: last_executed_at
docs: Phase-5: unix timestamp of last successful `execute_action` for
this `(strategy, target, discriminator)` triple. Set inside the
instruction handler.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Forward-compatibility cushion. See `VaultState._reserved`.

types.name: AllowedToken
docs: Per-mint protocol-level allow-list entry. Existence of the PDA at
`["allowed_token", mint]` is the whitelist check; the data carries
just the mint pubkey (for off-chain `program.account.allowedToken.all()`
queries) and the bump.

types.name: AutoActionConfig
docs: Phase-5: declarative "what should this strategy do when funds enter
(kind = 0) or leave (kind = 1)" record. Read off-chain by the agent;
the agent then calls `execute_action` with this `(target_program,
discriminator, ix_data)` tuple. Frontend reads it to display
auto-deploy intent. Auto-CPI from inside `deposit` / `rebalance` is
not yet wired — admin-curated declaration today, on-chain enforcement
later.

fields.name: kind
docs: 0 = Deposit, 1 = Withdraw. Anything else is rejected at set time.

fields.name: ix_data
docs: Phase-5: bytes appended after the `discriminator` to form the
inner CPI's `data`. Capped at 256 to bound rent + compute. Most
adapters fit in <64 bytes (a single `u64` amount + a few flags).

fields.name: kind
docs: 0 = Deposit, 1 = Withdraw.

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Global protocol configuration. Single PDA at seeds `["protocol_config"]`.
`governance` gates `set_treasury`, `set_protocol_fee_bps`, and
`set_governance`. `protocol_fee_bps` is the constant slice carved from
every vault's `performance_fee_bps` and routed to `treasury`'s
underlying ATA at withdraw time.

fields.name: authority_bump
docs: Stored bump for the strategy_authority PDA.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Phase-5: forward-compatibility cushion. See `VaultState._reserved`.

fields.name: previous_allocated
docs: Strategy's `allocated_amount` before the settle.

fields.name: computed_value
docs: Computed live value as the sum across the strategy's value sources.

fields.name: delta_signed
docs: Signed delta booked into both `strategy.allocated_amount` and
`vault.total_deposited`. Positive = yield, negative = loss.

types.name: ValueSource
docs: Phase-5: per-strategy value-source registry entry. A strategy can have
up to `MAX_VALUE_SOURCES_PER_STRATEGY` sources; the live value of the
strategy is the sum across them. Source kinds:
- kind = 0 (SplAtaBalance): read the SPL Token Account `amount` at
offset 64..72 of `target_account.data`. `offset` is ignored.
- kind = 1 (AccountU64): read the u64 at `target_account.data[offset..offset+8]`.
`scale_num / scale_den` is then applied to convert the raw read into
underlying-token units (e.g. cToken → underlying via the protocol's
exchange rate). Both default to 1.

fields.name: index
docs: Per-strategy slot index, 0..MAX_VALUE_SOURCES_PER_STRATEGY-1.

fields.name: kind
docs: 0 = SplAtaBalance, 1 = AccountU64.

fields.name: offset
docs: Byte offset for `AccountU64`. Ignored for `SplAtaBalance`.

types.name: VaultAllowedToken
docs: Per-vault, curator-controlled mint allow-list entry. Existence of
the PDA at `["vault_allowed_token", vault_state, mint]` narrows the
protocol-level `AllowedToken` allow-list down to the curator's
chosen subset for *this* vault. `execute_action` requires both
PDAs to exist when an `AllowedAction` declares an `output_mint_index`
— defense-in-depth: governance vetoes broken mints globally, the
vault admin further constrains the swap-output universe per vault.

fields.name: vault_authority_bump
docs: Audit refactor: stored bump for the vault_authority PDA so signing
CPIs doesn't recompute it every call.

fields.name: total_active_weight_bps
docs: Audit #18: invariant `sum(target_weight_bps for active strategies) ≤ 10_000`.

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Audit #21: two-step admin transfer. `Pubkey::default()` means no pending.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Phase-5: forward-compatibility cushion so future fields can be
added by re-binarising existing accounts via `realloc` rather than
orphaning live state. Keep zeroed.
